title: EasterEggs
description: An Easter Eggs plugin, made to customise for you.
body:
# The easiest and best way to create Easter Eggs!

## Requirements:
MySQL

## What is this plugin?
EasterEggs is a free to use and easy Easter Egg plugin for your server.

Including:
Easy to use GUI
Easy reset
Customizable Messages
Customizable Commands on egg found and on all eggs found
Customizable Skull Value
Customizable Music/Sound effects

To Do:
YAML Storage Support
PlaceholderAPI Support
Base64 Storage Support
API for Developers (instead of using commands)

**PLEASE NOTE**: This plugin is a hobby plugin owned by Blue_Bed. We want to make sure this plugin gets updates, but support for all versions and new versions may not always be consistent and/or exist in the future.
